posts.text: Two oil tankers and two LPG carriers are crossing the Strait of Hormuz **inbound** via the Omani route with their AIS turned on (under heavy US Navy / Airforce watch). Washington trying hard to keep the Omani route on.
posts.summary: The U.S. is actively monitoring shipping traffic through the Strait of Hormuz via an alternative Omani route to maintain crude oil and LPG supply flows, suggesting efforts to keep Persian Gulf energy exports moving despite regional tensions.
